overview: Jesus Online Zone is a digital services ordering platform for an Indian online services shop. Customers can browse 30 services across 5 categories (Government, Banking, Jobs, Printing, Design), search and filter services, and place orders with document uploads. The platform includes an admin dashboard to manage and track all incoming orders.
features: Browse 30 services across 5 categories with search and filter
Order placement with document upload support
Order modal with UPI payment details and file drag-and-drop
Admin dashboard to view all orders in a sortable table
Responsive design for mobile, tablet, and desktop
Service card hover animations and smooth UI interactions
